reviews.review_description:
Community Media Manager here.

We hear you. We are aware of the bug where the computer is empty upon launching the game. A temporary fix for this is simply restating your game until it works.

This game has a lot of bugs and we’re working on fixing them. Thank you for your patience.

If you have a problem with a purchase, you can contact me on the offical Dread or Dead TikTok account or you can dm me on discord @abrokensonnet.
I think that there is something wrong because when I play this game, I load in. Correct. But when it shows the computer & mouse, the tv goes blank (black). Then I can’t play.. help

Dread or Dead is a really fun multiplayer game that is horror based and I have played this game a whole lot and it is my 3rd favorite game also its is funny when you are being chased by the monster and everyone is screaming and trying to not get killed but there is a few bugs like the computer one where you can’t use the mouse but that on can be fixed by leaving and rejoining the game

reviews.review_title: The game should be called Dread and hell
reviews.review_description:
I really think this game is so much fun and the monster for me is so freaking scary like when i was a kid, i was scared of the map from dora, and the monster looks like a mutation of him + its a dark map with only one weak flashlight so i find this game more scary then any 
other even paid games on quest store but this game has some downsides:
-After a midnight in my country (Poland) it gives me after loading the computer an error that tolds me to restart the game and after i reapeated the process 3 times its still broken, and theres also like really loud sound (like TV static) so i leave the game with my pants full.
-Usually when i join the game the game has started and im alone and im saying random lobby not the one i choose so i would recommend a system when you are joining a random lobby its more like'ly to join the game that has not started.
-monsterless rounds, i mean devs are fixing it so im not gonna write a whole essay about it.
- 1 map only, for me the game is still fun but another map like a hospital or some will be fun (i know this game is about moles but still it would be very fun).
Overall the game is scary and fun devs have to add more maps and fix those issues but its still very good game👍🔥

I loved this game! I can't stop playing it. The monsters cool and scary. You mine and survive as a mole. There's a shop for ores. And it's fun to do rounds and stuff! I just kinda want a double trouble game mode and infection. Thank you for this game!
About this game when I was joining multiplayer  I just kick me out of the game every single time and please fix the multiplayer ￼￼

reviews.review_title: This is the end of a great game
reviews.review_description: Dread or dead was one of THE BEST games I ever played it was amazing. but now servers don’t work properly the creator doesn’t update it so everything is slowly becoming corrupted. Goodbye to a great game it was fun

reviews.review_title: Good but could use more updates
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun and terrifying, but I feel like it could greatly benefit with more updates or more maps. The game is still awesome though
i was in the mind alone and i heard something fall over and i looked behind me and i saw the monster

So I was playing the the game with a contributor and ￼when a found ended i was the monster but the red light was flashing and I got kicked from the server and if y’all are just gonna ignore your review then your games is gonna die so FIX IT
Idc how i bought 1500 ore and didnt get anything this game is fhe best and whoever puts one star review you suck

Good game, this game is really good and a bit scary to but I tried to buy 500 ore and it never gave me the ore even tho I paid for it.but I thought it was a glitch so I restarted my game and tried to buy 100 ore and it never gave me the ore and spent about $10 for nothing but overall a good game and recommend this game.
Moderators and game are amazing and kind. Game is also fire ngl🔥
Is really good for me the funny moments and the memories will never go away ￼
Just a good game compared to all the monkey horror slop.

I love this game so much but when it hits 12 or 1 in the clock the servers are dead i really think it’s needs more attention this game is so fun and I don’t know why people are not inspired whoever is reading this please play the game I need more players

Devs if you see this please make it so that you don't have to restart your game for your ore to get added to your account but more important the camo umbrella is useless cause x ray so please make it disable the x-ray but have like a charge thanks :D

People who say this game is unplayable or bugged are mostly wrong. There are lots of bugs, but most of them can be worked through by quitting and restarting the game, or simply by getting used to them. Also, most of the bugs that are in the game do not make it unplayable, If somebody says that they are just bad at the game themselves. It’s a really fun and scary game, and Id highly recommend playing it.
Good game but add more maps and I keep getting stuck on the computer

OK this game is great and fun when it works half the time the monster doesn't get selected or the screen just stays black especially on refurb (one of the two maps) and maybe add a few monster cosmetics like different skins or something I dunno
Every time i try to play the game lags then I get a black screen
This game is a lot of fun! I love how you can be the monster and mine for ore. I only hope the developers will add more maps and monsters that you can be! 5 stars
I like this game so much, actually idk what to say :/

the flashlights arent the best, and some people troll and don't go in the elevator, or press the elevator early not letting the game start. ( there was also a glitch where i couldnt use the mouse after leaving a lobby )

The refurb map is great and all but PLEASE FIX THE SHELVES because i always get stuck in warehouse or entrance and get stuck on something in the hallways same for mines because i get stuck on the rails or just random crack but amazing game!👍

Dose it take forever to load like I think it has low severs but I’ve seen people play it and it looks amazing so even tho I can’t play it am still gonna give it 3 stars because if it did work it would be 5 stars

This game HAS a big potential and has a pretty neat gameplay and stuff. But the only issue I have is that the game is SUPER dead. It's almost impossible to find someone in this game but hey! It's a worth a game!

This game is very scary and fun, it’s one of my favorite games. But when I was playing as the monster in the refurb map, nobody was dying when I touched them, I put my hand on them, nothing happens, I put my face on them, nothing happens, I put my whole frickin body on them, they still don’t die. This was really pissing me off and now I never want to be the monster again.
Fun to run around and play especially in publics.
Some people say n words, be rude, and the monster sometimes doesnt spawn. But when you actually play the game its fun and scary
first there are lots of cosmetics second addictive last no toxic players.

First time i tried to play i got stuck on the loading screen but when i reloaded my game it worked, i love the idea of it and all the interactivity of it. I got to be the monster on my 3rd game which was fun but the game was also very confusing as i had no idea what to do. There were also lots of bugs, for example Halfway though my game everyones mics cut out and i could barley hear them in the first place. Also. When i left my multiplayer game and was back at the computer i couldnt hold the mouse. Overall a fun and unique game but has lots of bugs. Thank you for reading!

developer_response.body: Hello please contact us immediately! discord.gg/dreadordead or contact@dreadordeadvr.com

reviews.review_description: CATOS WAS THE FORGOTTEN ONE

the game just randomly picks you it doesn't actually give you a percent chance of being the monster it just randomly picks people so one person can be the monster twice in a row and one person will never be the monster at all

developer_response.body: Hey, thanks for trying the game! The monster selection system is actually entirely random, meaning yes, a player can be the monster multiple times in a row. Given that it is random, everyone has an equal chance at all times.

reviews.review_description: I downloaded this game a while ago on my meta quest 2 and when I got into the game, I did the tutorial, I loaded into a server, but when I got it my screen only showed a small amount, I couldn’t move about, and the FPS was about 1 frame per 7 seconds, I tried this so many times but everything was fine until I went into a server, which I have never been able to use, I have not actually been able to play this game yet so I hope if this big gets fixed, the game will be very good
